simple_types.name: EMR_CMPMODE_Field
simple_types.code:
type EMR_CMPMODE_Field is
   LOW,
   HIGH,
   IN_k,
   OUT_k)
  with Size => 2;

enumeration_literals.name: LOW
enumeration_literals.description:
Generates an event when the converted data is higher than the high
threshold of the window.

enumeration_literals.name: HIGH
enumeration_literals.description: Generates an event when the converted data is in the comparison window.

enumeration_literals.name: IN_k
enumeration_literals.description: Generates an event when the converted data is out of the comparison window.

simple_types.name: MR_ANACH_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_ANACH_Field is
   NONE,
   ALLOWED)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NONE
enumeration_literals.description:
Allows different analog settings for each channel. See ADC_CGR and ADC_COR
Registers

simple_types.name: MR_FREERUN_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_FREERUN_Field is
   OFF,
   ON)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: OFF
enumeration_literals.description: Free Run Mode: Never wait for any trigger.

simple_types.name: MR_FWUP_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_FWUP_Field is
   OFF,
   ON)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: OFF
enumeration_literals.description:
If SLEEP is 1 then Fast Wake-up Sleep Mode: The Voltage reference is ON
between conversions and ADC Core is OFF

simple_types.name: MR_SETTLING_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_SETTLING_Field is
   AST3,
   AST5,
   AST9,
   AST17)
  with Size => 2;

simple_types.name: MR_SLEEP_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_SLEEP_Field is
   NORMAL,
   SLEEP)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NORMAL
enumeration_literals.description: Sleep Mode: The wake-up time can be modified by programming FWUP bit

simple_types.name: MR_STARTUP_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_STARTUP_Field is
   SUT0,
   SUT8,
   SUT16,
   SUT24,
   SUT64,
   SUT80,
   SUT96,
   SUT112,
,
,
,
,
,
,
   …,
   SUT960)
  with Size => 4;

simple_types.name: MR_TRGEN_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_TRGEN_Field is
   DIS,
   EN)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: DIS
enumeration_literals.description: Hardware trigger selected by TRGSEL field is enabled.

simple_types.name: MR_TRGSEL_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_TRGSEL_Field is
   ADC_TRIG0,
   ADC_TRIG1,
   ADC_TRIG2,
   ADC_TRIG3,
   ADC_TRIG4,
   ADC_TRIG5)
  with Size => 3;

enumeration_literals.name: ADC_TRIG0
enumeration_literals.description: TIOA Output of the Timer Counter Channel 0

enumeration_literals.name: ADC_TRIG1
enumeration_literals.description: TIOA Output of the Timer Counter Channel 1

enumeration_literals.name: ADC_TRIG2
enumeration_literals.description: TIOA Output of the Timer Counter Channel 2

simple_types.name: MR_USEQ_Field
simple_types.code:
type MR_USEQ_Field is
   NUM_ORDER,
   REG_ORDER)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: NUM_ORDER
enumeration_literals.description:
User Sequence Mode: The sequence respects what is defined in ADC_SEQR1 and
ADC_SEQR2 registers and can be used to convert several times the same
channel.

simple_types.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field
simple_types.code:
type WPMR_WPKEY_Field is
   WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset,
   PASSWD)
  with Size => 24;

enumeration_literals.name: WPMR_WPKEY_Field_Reset
enumeration_literals.description:
Writing any other value in this field aborts the write operation of the
WPEN bit.Always reads as 0

array_types.name: ADC_CGR_GAIN_Field_Array
array_types.code:
type ADC_CGR_GAIN_Field_Array is array (0 .. 15) of ADC_CGR_GAIN_Element
  with Component_Size => 2, Size => 32;
